'''kazate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:legato|legato]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-z-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:legato|legato]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kazate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:kazate|kazate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kazatesher|kazatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kazatesherĂ«m|kazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kazatero|kazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kazateshĂ«|kazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kazateshĂ«m|kazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikazatero|gokikazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikazateshĂ«|gokikazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikazateshĂ«m|gokikazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokazankerom|gokazankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokazankeshĂ«|gokazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokazankeshĂ«m|gokazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokazankeya|gokazankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kazaterom|kazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kazatemu|kazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kazateya|kazateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikazaterom|gokikazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikazatemu|gokikazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikazateya|gokikazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:kazazate|kazazate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kazazatesher|kazazatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kazazatesherĂ«m|kazazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kazazatero|kazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kazazateshĂ«|kazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kazazateshĂ«m|kazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikazazatero|gokikazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikazazateshĂ«|gokikazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikazazateshĂ«m|gokikazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokazazankerom|gokazazankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokazazankeshĂ«|gokazazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokazazankeshĂ«m|gokazazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokazazankeya|gokazazankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kazazaterom|kazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kazazatemu|kazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kazazateya|kazazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikazazaterom|gokikazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikazazatemu|gokikazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikazazateya|gokikazazateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:kĂŠzĂŠte|kĂŠzĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kĂŠzĂŠtesher|kĂŠzĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m|kĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠzĂŠtero|kĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|kĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|kĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠzĂŠtero|gokikĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|gokikĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|gokikĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokĂŠzĂŠnkerom|gokĂŠzĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«|gokĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gokĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokĂŠzĂŠnkeya|gokĂŠzĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠzĂŠterom|kĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠzĂŠtemu|kĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kĂŠzĂŠteya|kĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠzĂŠterom|gokikĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠzĂŠtemu|gokikĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikĂŠzĂŠteya|gokikĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:kafzafte|kafzafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kafzaftesher|kafzaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafzaftesherĂ«m|kafzaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafzaftero|kafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kafzafteshĂ«|kafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafzafteshĂ«m|kafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafzaftero|gokikafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikafzafteshĂ«|gokikafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafzafteshĂ«m|gokikafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokafzafnkerom|gokafzafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokafzafnkeshĂ«|gokafzafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokafzafnkeshĂ«m|gokafzafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokafzafnkeya|gokafzafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafzafterom|kafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafzaftemu|kafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kafzafteya|kafzafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafzafterom|gokikafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafzaftemu|gokikafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikafzafteya|gokikafzafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
